    setEntries(data || [])
    setLoading(false)
  }

  async function fetchMembers(entryId) {
    const { data } = await supabase.from('team_event_members')
      .select('*').eq('entry_id', entryId).order('member_order')
    setMembers(data || [])
  }

  function handleEventChange(eventId) {
    setSelectedEventId(eventId)
    setSelectedEntry(null); setMembers([])
    fetchEntries(eventId)
  }

  async function handleSelectEntry(entry) {
    setSelectedEntry(entry)
    await fetchMembers(entry.id)
  }

  async function handleUpdateStatus(entryId, newStatus) {
    const { error } = await supabase.from('team_event_entries')
      .update({ status: newStatus }).eq('id', entryId)
    if (error) { alert('?кі№к№ӯ и№ӮВҖеҜғ??г…ҪлҷЈ: ' + error.message); return }
    showToast?.('?кі№к№ӯ и№ӮВҖеҜғ? ' + newStatus)
    fetchEntries(selectedEventId)
    if (selectedEntry?.id === entryId) {
      setSelectedEntry(prev => ({ ...prev, status: newStatus }))
    }
  }

  // ??еҜғкі—м Ј ?кі№к№ӯ ?лӮ…лңІ?лҢ„л“ғ
  async function handlePaymentUpdate(entryId, status) {
    const { error } = await supabase.from('team_event_entries')
      .update({ payment_status: status, paid_at: status === 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә' ? new Date().toISOString() : null })
      .eq('id', entryId)
    if (error) { alert('еҜғкі—м Ј ?кі№к№ӯ и№ӮВҖеҜғ??г…ҪлҷЈ: ' + error.message); return }
    showToast?.('еҜғкі—м Ј ?кі№к№ӯ и№ӮВҖеҜғ? ' + status)
    fetchEntries(selectedEventId)
    if (selectedEntry?.id === entryId) {
      setSelectedEntry(prev => ({ ...prev, payment_status: status }))
    }
  }

  function formatDate(d) {
    if (!d) return ''
    const dt = new Date(d)
    return `${dt.getMonth() + 1}/${dt.getDate()} ${dt.getHours()}:${String(dt.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0')}`
  }

  const statusCounts = {
    total: entries.length,
    pending: entries.filter(e => e.status === 'pending').length,
    confirmed: entries.filter(e => e.status === 'confirmed').length,
  }

  // ??еҜғкі—м Ј з§»лҢҒмҠ«??  const paymentCounts = {
    paid: entries.filter(e => e.payment_status === 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә').length,
    unpaid: entries.filter(e => !e.payment_status || e.payment_status === 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”').length,
  }

  const selectedEvent = events.find(ev => ev.event_id === selectedEventId)

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      <h2 className="text-sm font-bold">?лЈҰжҲӘ??в‘Ҙк»ң???мўҺк»Ңж„ҝВҖз”ұ?/h2>

      {/* ?ВҖ???мўҸк№® */}
      <div>
        <select value={selectedEventId} onChange={e => handleEventChange(e.target.value)}
          className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5">
          <option value="">?ВҖ?лҡ®? ?мўҸк№®?м„ҸкҪӯ??/option>
          {events.map(ev => (
            <option key={ev.event_id} value={ev.event_id}>
              {ev.event_name} ({ev.event_date}) {ev.status === 'OPEN' ? '?мңҹ' : ''}
            </option>
          ))}
        </select>
      </div>

      {/* еҜғмҺ„лҰ°и«ӣв‘№л–Ү ?м’–л–Ҷ */}
      {selectedEvent && (selectedEvent.event_type === 'team' || selectedEvent.event_type === 'both') && (
        <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 flex items-center gap-2">
          <span className="text-xs text-blue-600">еҜғмҺ„лҰ°и«ӣв‘№л–Ү:</span>
          <span className="text-sm font-bold text-blue-800">
            {getMatchTypeLabel(selectedEvent.team_match_type)}
          </span>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ?кҫӘмҶҙ ?л¶ҝл№ҹ */}
      {selectedEventId && (
        <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
          <div className="bg-white border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2 flex-1 text-center min-w-[60px]">
            <p className="text-lg font-bold">{statusCounts.total}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-sub">?кҫ©к»ң</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-yellow-50 border border-yellow-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 flex-1 text-center min-w-[60px]">
            <p className="text-lg font-bold text-yellow-600">{statusCounts.pending}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-yellow-600">?ВҖж№І?/p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-green-50 border border-green-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 flex-1 text-center min-w-[60px]">
            <p className="text-lg font-bold text-green-600">{statusCounts.confirmed}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-green-600">?ләӨм ҷ</p>
          </div>
          {/* ??еҜғкі—м Ј ?кҫӘмҶҙ */}
          <div className="bg-green-50 border border-green-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 flex-1 text-center min-w-[60px]">
            <p className="text-lg font-bold text-green-700">{paymentCounts.paid}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-green-700">еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 flex-1 text-center min-w-[60px]">
            <p className="text-lg font-bold text-red-600">{paymentCounts.unpaid}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-red-600">иӘҳлӘғк¶”</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ?кіёкҪӯ и№ӮлӢҝлҰ° */}
      {selectedEntry && (
        <div className="bg-white border border-line rounded-lg p-4 space-y-3">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <button onClick={() => { setSelectedEntry(null); setMembers([]) }}
              className="text-sm text-accent">??п§Ҹв‘ёмӨү</button>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${STATUS_MAP[selectedEntry.status]?.color || ''}`}>
                {STATUS_MAP[selectedEntry.status]?.label || selectedEntry.status}
              </span>
              {/* ??еҜғкі—м Ј и«ӣкі—? */}
              <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${PAYMENT_MAP[selectedEntry.payment_status || 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”']?.color || 'bg-red-50 text-red-600'}`}>
                {PAYMENT_MAP[selectedEntry.payment_status || 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”']?.label || 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”'}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-1">
            <p className="text-sm"><span className="text-sub">?лҢҖмқҮп§Ҹ?</span> <b>{selectedEntry.club_name}</b></p>
            <p className="text-sm"><span className="text-sub">йҒәВҖ??</span> <b>{selectedEntry.division_name || 'иӘҳлӘ„???}</b></p>
            <p className="text-sm"><span className="text-sub">?ВҖ??</span> {selectedEntry.captain_name}</p>
            {selectedEvent && (
              <p className="text-sm"><span className="text-sub">еҜғмҺ„лҰ°и«ӣв‘№л–Ү:</span> <b>{getMatchTypeLabel(selectedEvent.team_match_type)}</b></p>
            )}
            <p className="text-sm"><span className="text-sub">?мўҺк»Ң??</span> {formatDate(selectedEntry.created_at)}</p>
          </div>

          {/* ?мўҺлӢ” п§ҸлӮ…л–’ */}
          <div>
            <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">?мўҺлӢ” п§ҸлӮ…л–’ ({members.length}п§Ҹ?</p>
            <table className="w-full text-sm">
              <thead>
                <tr className="bg-gray-50 text-xs text-sub">
                  <th className="text-left px-2 py-1.5 w-8">#</th>
                  <th className="text-left px-2 py-1.5">?лҢҖм««</th>
                  <th className="text-left px-2 py-1.5 w-12">?к№…нҖҺ</th>
                  <th className="text-left px-2 py-1.5 w-16">?к№ғнҲ’</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {members.map((m, i) => (
                  <tr key={m.id} className="border-t border-line/30">
                    <td className="px-2 py-1.5 text-xs text-sub">{i + 1}</td>
                    <td className="px-2 py-1.5">{m.member_name}</td>
                    <td className="px-2 py-1.5 text-xs">{m.gender === 'M' ? '?? : m.gender === 'F' ? '?? : '-'}</td>
                    <td className="px-2 py-1.5 text-xs text-accent">{m.grade || '-'}</td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>

          {/* ??еҜғкі—м Ј ?кі№к№ӯ и№ӮВҖеҜғ?иё°кҫӘл“ү */}
          <div className="pt-2 border-t border-line">
            <p className="text-xs text-sub mb-2">?л®Ҙ еҜғкі—м Ј ?кі№к№ӯ</p>
            <div className="flex gap-2">
              {(selectedEntry.payment_status || 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”') !== 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә' && (
                <button onClick={() => handlePaymentUpdate(selectedEntry.id, 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә')}
                  className="flex-1 py-2 bg-green-500 text-white text-sm rounded-lg hover:bg-green-600">
                  ?л®Ҙ еҜғкі—м Ј?ләӨм”Ө
                </button>
              )}
              {(selectedEntry.payment_status || 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”') !== '?кҫ©мҳЈ?в‘ё?' && (selectedEntry.payment_status || 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”') !== 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә' && (
                <button onClick={() => handlePaymentUpdate(selectedEntry.id, '?кҫ©мҳЈ?в‘ё?')}
                  className="flex-1 py-2 bg-yellow-500 text-white text-sm rounded-lg hover:bg-yellow-600">
                  ?лЈұ ?кҫ©мҳЈ?в‘ё?
                </button>
              )}
              {selectedEntry.payment_status === 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә' && (
                <button onClick={() => handlePaymentUpdate(selectedEntry.id, 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”')}
                  className="flex-1 py-2 bg-gray-200 text-gray-700 text-sm rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-300">
                  еҜғкі—м Ј з—Қв‘Ҙлғј ??иӘҳлӘғк¶”
                </button>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* ?кі№к№ӯ и№ӮВҖеҜғ?иё°кҫӘл“ү */}
          <div className="flex gap-2 pt-2 border-t border-line">
            {selectedEntry.status === 'pending' && (
              <>
                <button onClick={() => handleUpdateStatus(selectedEntry.id, 'confirmed')}
                  className="flex-1 py-2 bg-green-500 text-white text-sm rounded-lg hover:bg-green-600">
                  ???ләӨм ҷ
                </button>
                <button onClick={() => handleUpdateStatus(selectedEntry.id, 'cancelled')}
                  className="flex-1 py-2 bg-red-500 text-white text-sm rounded-lg hover:bg-red-600">
                  ??з—Қв‘Ҙлғј
                </button>
              </>
            )}
            {selectedEntry.status === 'confirmed' && (
              <button onClick={() => handleUpdateStatus(selectedEntry.id, 'cancelled')}
                className="flex-1 py-2 bg-red-500 text-white text-sm rounded-lg hover:bg-red-600">
                ??з—Қв‘Ҙлғј
              </button>
            )}
            {selectedEntry.status === 'cancelled' && (
              <button onClick={() => handleUpdateStatus(selectedEntry.id, 'pending')}
                className="flex-1 py-2 bg-yellow-500 text-white text-sm rounded-lg hover:bg-yellow-600">
                ?лҙҪ ?ВҖж№Ікі•мӨҲ и№ӮВҖеҜғ?              </button>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* п§Ҹв‘ёмӨү */}
      {selectedEventId && !selectedEntry && (
        <>
          {loading ? (
            <p className="text-sm text-sub py-8 text-center">йҒәлҚҲмңӯ?г…»л’— д»Ҙ?..</p>
          ) : entries.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-sm text-sub py-8 text-center">?мўҺк»Ң ?лҢҒлҝӯ???лҶҒл’ҝ?лҚҲл–Һ.</p>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {entries.map(entry => (
                <button key={entry.id} onClick={() => handleSelectEntry(entry)}
                  className="w-full text-left bg-white border border-line rounded-lg p-3 hover:bg-soft transition-colors">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <span className="text-sm font-bold">{entry.club_name}</span>
                      {entry.division_name && (
                        <span className="text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-blue-50 text-blue-600">{entry.division_name}</span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      {/* ??еҜғкі—м Ј и«ӣкі—? */}
                      <span className={`text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded ${PAYMENT_MAP[entry.payment_status || 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”']?.color || 'bg-red-50 text-red-600'}`}>
                        {PAYMENT_MAP[entry.payment_status || 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”']?.label || 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”'}
                      </span>
                      <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${STATUS_MAP[entry.status]?.color || ''}`}>
                        {STATUS_MAP[entry.status]?.label || entry.status}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs text-sub">
                    <span>?ВҖ?? {entry.captain_name}</span>
                    <span>{formatDate(entry.created_at)}</span>
                  </div>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
// ========== C:\Users\homem\OneDrive\л°”нғ• нҷ”л©ҙ\jeju-tennis-app\src\pages\admin\EntryAdmin.jsx ==========
import { useState, useEffect, useContext } from 'react'
import { supabase } from '../../lib/supabase'
import { ToastContext } from '../../App'

export default function EntryAdmin() {
  const showToast = useContext(ToastContext)
  const [events, setEvents] = useState([])
  const [entries, setEntries] = useState([])        // еӘӣм’–м”Ө??  const [teamEntries, setTeamEntries] = useState([]) // ???в‘Ҙк»ң??  const [selectedEventId, setSelectedEventId] = useState('')
  const [filterPayment, setFilterPayment] = useState('')
  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState('')   // ??еӘӣм’–м”Ө/?в‘Ҙк»ң ?кҫӘкҪЈ
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)

  useEffect(() => { fetchEvents() }, [])
  useEffect(() => { if (selectedEventId) { fetchEntries(); fetchTeamEntries() } }, [selectedEventId])

  async function fetchEvents() {
    const { data } = await supabase.from('events').select('*').order('event_date', { ascending: false })
    setEvents(data || [])
  }

  async function fetchEntries() {
    setLoading(true)
    const { data } = await supabase
      .from('event_entries')
      .select(`
        *,
        teams ( team_id, team_name, member1_id, member2_id ),
        event_divisions ( division_name )
      `)
      .eq('event_id', selectedEventId)
      .neq('entry_status', 'з—Қв‘Ҙлғј')
      .order('applied_at', { ascending: false })
    setEntries(data || [])
    setLoading(false)
  }

  // ???в‘Ҙк»ң???мўҺк»Ң иӯ°кі мү¶
  async function fetchTeamEntries() {
    const { data } = await supabase
      .from('team_event_entries')
      .select('*')
      .eq('event_id', selectedEventId)
      .neq('status', 'cancelled')
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    setTeamEntries(data || [])
  }

  // ???л“Ҝл№Җ п§Ҹв‘ёмӨү ?м•№кҪҰ
  const allEntries = [
    ...entries.map(e => ({
      id: e.entry_id,
      type: 'еӘӣм’–м”Ө',
      name: e.teams?.team_name || '-',
      division: e.event_divisions?.division_name || '-',
      status: e.entry_status,
      payment_status: e.payment_status,
      date: e.applied_at,
      _source: 'individual',
      _raw: e,
    })),
    ...teamEntries.map(e => ({
      id: e.id,
      type: '?в‘Ҙк»ң',
      name: e.club_name || '-',
      division: e.division_name || '-',
      status: e.status === 'confirmed' ? '?ләӨм ҷ' : e.status === 'pending' ? '?ВҖж№І? : e.status,
      payment_status: e.payment_status || 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”',
      date: e.created_at,
      _source: 'team',
      _raw: e,
    })),
  ]

  const filtered = allEntries.filter(e => {
    if (filterPayment && e.payment_status !== filterPayment) return false
    if (filterType === 'еӘӣм’–м”Ө' && e.type !== 'еӘӣм’–м”Ө') return false
    if (filterType === '?в‘Ҙк»ң' && e.type !== '?в‘Ҙк»ң') return false
    return true
  })

  const totalCount = filtered.length
  const paidCount = filtered.filter(e => e.payment_status === 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә').length
  const unpaidCount = filtered.filter(e => e.payment_status === 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”').length

  // еӘӣм’–м”Ө??еҜғкі—м Ј ?лӮ…лңІ?лҢ„л“ғ
  async function handlePaymentUpdate(entry) {
    const newStatus = entry.payment_status === 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә' ? 'иӘҳлӘғк¶”' : 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә'
    if (entry._source === 'individual') {
      await supabase.from('event_entries')
        .update({ payment_status: newStatus, paid_at: newStatus === 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә' ? new Date().toISOString() : null })
        .eq('entry_id', entry.id)
    } else {
      // ???в‘Ҙк»ң??еҜғкі—м Ј ?лӮ…лңІ?лҢ„л“ғ
      await supabase.from('team_event_entries')
        .update({ payment_status: newStatus, paid_at: newStatus === 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә' ? new Date().toISOString() : null })
        .eq('id', entry.id)
    }
    showToast?.('еҜғкі—м Ј ?кі№к№ӯ и№ӮВҖеҜғ? ' + newStatus)
    fetchEntries(); fetchTeamEntries()
  }

  async function handlePaymentSet(entry, status) {
    if (entry._source === 'individual') {
      await supabase.from('event_entries')
        .update({ payment_status: status, paid_at: status === 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә' ? new Date().toISOString() : null })
        .eq('entry_id', entry.id)
    } else {
      await supabase.from('team_event_entries')
        .update({ payment_status: status, paid_at: status === 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә' ? new Date().toISOString() : null })
        .eq('id', entry.id)
    }
    showToast?.('еҜғкі—м Ј ?кі№к№ӯ и№ӮВҖеҜғ? ' + status)
    fetchEntries(); fetchTeamEntries()
  }

  async function handleCancel(entry) {
    if (!confirm('???мўҺк»Ң??з—Қв‘Ҙлғј?м„Ҹл–ҶеҜғмўҺл’ҝ?лҚҮнүҙ?')) return
    if (entry._source === 'individual') {
      await supabase.from('event_entries')
        .update({ entry_status: 'з—Қв‘Ҙлғј', cancelled_at: new Date().toISOString() })
        .eq('entry_id', entry.id)
    } else {
      await supabase.from('team_event_entries')
        .update({ status: 'cancelled' })
        .eq('id', entry.id)
    }
    showToast?.('?мўҺк»Ң з—Қв‘Ҙлғј??)
    fetchEntries(); fetchTeamEntries()
  }

  return (
    <div>
      <h2 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4">?лұҘ п§Ўл©ё??мўҺк»Ң ж„ҝВҖз”ұ?/h2>

      {/* ?ВҖ???мўҸк№® + ?кҫӘкҪЈ */}
      <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4 flex-wrap">
        <select value={selectedEventId} onChange={e => { setSelectedEventId(e.target.value); setEntries([]); setTeamEntries([]) }}
          className="flex-1 min-w-[200px] text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
          <option value="">?ВҖ???мўҸк№®</option>
          {events.map(ev => (
            <option key={ev.event_id} value={ev.event_id}>{ev.event_name} ({ev.event_date})</option>
          ))}
        </select>
        {/* ???мўҸмӮҺ ?кҫӘкҪЈ */}
        <select value={filterType} onChange={e => setFilterType(e.target.value)}
          className="text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
          <option value="">?кҫ©к»ң ?мўҸмӮҺ</option>
          <option value="еӘӣм’–м”Ө">еӘӣм’–м”Ө?кҫЁмӯ”</option>
          <option value="?в‘Ҙк»ң">?в‘Ҙк»ң?кҫЁмӯ”</option>
        </select>
        <select value={filterPayment} onChange={e => setFilterPayment(e.target.value)}
          className="text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
          <option value="">?кҫ©к»ң еҜғкі—м Ј?кі№к№ӯ</option>
          <option value="иӘҳлӘғк¶”">иӘҳлӘғк¶”п§Қ?/option>
          <option value="еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә">еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰәп§Қ?/option>
          <option value="?кҫ©мҳЈ?в‘ё?">?кҫ©мҳЈ?в‘ё?</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      {/* з§»лҢҒмҠ«??*/}
      {selectedEventId && (
        <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4">
          <div className="bg-accent text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-lg">
            <p className="text-[10px] opacity-80">?кҫ©к»ң</p>
            <p className="text-lg font-bold">{totalCount}?ВҖ</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-green-50 text-green-700 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg">
            <p className="text-[10px]">еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә</p>
            <p className="text-lg font-bold">{paidCount}?ВҖ</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-red-50 text-red-600 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg">
            <p className="text-[10px]">иӘҳлӘғк¶”</p>
            <p className="text-lg font-bold">{unpaidCount}?ВҖ</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ?л·Җл“ғз”ұ?п§Ҹв‘ёмӨү */}
      {!selectedEventId ? (
        <p className="text-center py-8 text-sub text-sm">?ВҖ?лҡ®? ?мўҸк№®?лҢҒпјң?лӘ„мҠӮ.</p>
      ) : loading ? (
        <p className="text-center py-8 text-sub text-sm">жҝЎм’•лө« д»Ҙ?..</p>
      ) : (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-r border border-line overflow-x-auto">
          <table className="w-full text-sm">
            <thead className="bg-soft2">
              <tr>
                <th className="px-3 py-2 text-center text-sub font-medium">?мўҸмӮҺ</th>
                <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left text-sub font-medium">йҒәВҖ??/th>
                <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left text-sub font-medium">?ВҖ/?лҢҖмқҮ</th>
                <th className="px-3 py-2 text-center text-sub font-medium">?кі№к№ӯ</th>
                <th className="px-3 py-2 text-center text-sub font-medium">еҜғкі—м Ј</th>
                <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left text-sub font-medium">?мўҺк»Ң??/th>
                <th className="px-3 py-2 text-center text-sub font-medium">?вүӘлҖЎ</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {filtered.length === 0 ? (
                <tr><td colSpan={7} className="text-center py-8 text-sub">?мўҺк»Ң ?лҢҒлҝӯ ?лҶҒм“¬</td></tr>
              ) : filtered.map(e => (
                <tr key={`${e._source}-${e.id}`} className="border-t border-line hover:bg-soft">
                  {/* ???мўҸмӮҺ и«ӣкі—? */}
                  <td className="px-3 py-2 text-center">
                    <span className={`text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded ${
                      e.type === '?в‘Ҙк»ң' ? 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-700' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'
                    }`}>{e.type}</span>
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2">{e.division}</td>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2 font-medium">{e.name}</td>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2 text-center">
                    <span className="text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-blue-50 text-blue-700">
                      {e.status}
                    </span>
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2 text-center">
                    <span className={`text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded ${
                      e.payment_status === 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә' ? 'bg-green-50 text-green-700' :
                      e.payment_status === '?кҫ©мҳЈ?в‘ё?' ? 'bg-yellow-50 text-yellow-700' :
                      'bg-red-50 text-red-600'
                    }`}>{e.payment_status}</span>
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2 text-xs text-sub">
                    {e.date ? new Date(e.date).toLocaleDateString('ko-KR') : '-'}
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2 text-center">
                    <div className="flex gap-1 justify-center flex-wrap">
                      {e.payment_status !== 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә' && (
                        <button onClick={() => handlePaymentSet(e, 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә')}
                          className="text-xs text-green-600 hover:underline">еҜғкі—м Ј?ләӨм”Ө</button>
                      )}
                      {e.payment_status !== '?кҫ©мҳЈ?в‘ё?' && e.payment_status !== 'еҜғкі—м Ј?кҫЁмҰә' && (
                        <button onClick={() => handlePaymentSet(e, '?кҫ©мҳЈ?в‘ё?')}
                          className="text-xs text-yellow-600 hover:underline">?кҫ©мҳЈ?в‘ё?</button>
                      )}
                      <button onClick={() => handleCancel(e)}
                        className="text-xs text-red-500 hover:underline">з—Қв‘Ҙлғј</button>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
// ========== C:\Users\homem\OneDrive\л°”нғ• нҷ”л©ҙ\jeju-tennis-app\src\pages\admin\EventAdmin.jsx ==========
import { useState, useEffect, useContext } from 'react'
import { supabase } from '../../lib/supabase'
import { ToastContext } from '../../App'

// ?СҠм”Ө??жҙ№м’–м ҷ?лЁҜкҪҢ еӘӣВҖ?лӘ„мӮӨ??йҒәВҖ??п§Ҹв‘ёмӨү (DB?лЁҜкҪҢ ?мҲҲмҹ» жҝЎм’•лұ¶)
// division_name ?лӮ…м ° ????п§Ҹв‘ёмӨү?лЁҜкҪҢ ?мўҸк№®?м„ҺлЈ„жҝЎ??м’•вҲј?г…јмҠ« ?м’“лӮ¬

export default function EventAdmin() {
  const showToast = useContext(ToastContext)
  const [events, setEvents] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [showForm, setShowForm] = useState(false)
  const [form, setForm] = useState({
    event_name: '', event_date: '', event_date_end: '', entry_fee_team: '',
    entry_open_at: '', entry_close_at: '', description: '', tournament_id: '',
    event_type: 'individual', team_match_type: '3_doubles', team_division_id: '',
    account_number: '', account_holder: '', account_bank: '',
  })
  const [tournaments, setTournaments] = useState([])
  const [pointRuleDivisions, setPointRuleDivisions] = useState([]) // ?СҠм”Ө??жҙ№м’–м ҷ йҒәВҖ??п§Ҹв‘ёмӨү

  // йҒәВҖ??ж„ҝВҖз”ұ?  const [selectedEvent, setSelectedEvent] = useState(null)
  const [eventDivisions, setEventDivisions] = useState([])
  const [divForm, setDivForm] = useState({ division_name: '', has_groups: false })

  // ?ВҖ???м„Ҹм ҷ п§Ҹв‘Өл––
  const [editingEvent, setEditingEvent] = useState(null)
  const [editForm, setEditForm] = useState({})
  const [showEditModal, setShowEditModal] = useState(false)

  // ?ВҖ???г…јм ҷ ?м„Ҹм ҷ (ж№Ікі—гҖҲ)
  const [editingTeamSettings, setEditingTeamSettings] = useState(null)

  useEffect(() => { fetchAll() }, [])

  async function fetchAll() {
    setLoading(true)
    const [{ data: evts }, { data: tours }, { data: rules }] = await Promise.all([
      supabase.from('events').select('*').order('event_date', { ascending: false }),
      supabase.from('tournaments_master').select('*').order('date', { ascending: false }),
      supabase.from('point_rules').select('division').order('sort_order', { ascending: true, nullsFirst: false }),
    ])
    setEvents(evts || [])
    setTournaments(tours || [])
    setPointRuleDivisions((rules || []).map(r => r.division).filter(Boolean))
    setLoading(false)
  }

  async function fetchDivisions(eventId) {
    // event_divisionsз‘ң?еӘӣВҖ?лӘ„мӮ© ??point_rules??sort_order ?м’–кҪҢ??п§ҚмҡҠмҫ¶ ?ләЈм №
    const [{ data: divs }, { data: prules }] = await Promise.all([
      supabase.from('event_divisions').select('*').eq('event_id', eventId),
      supabase.from('point_rules').select('division, sort_order').order('sort_order', { ascending: true, nullsFirst: false }),
    ])
    const sorted = (divs || []).sort((a, b) => {
      const ai = (prules || []).findIndex(r => r.division === a.division_name)
      const bi = (prules || []).findIndex(r => r.division === b.division_name)
      const aOrder = ai === -1 ? 9999 : ai
      const bOrder = bi === -1 ? 9999 : bi
      return aOrder - bOrder
    })
    setEventDivisions(sorted)
    return sorted
  }

  // ?ВҖ?ВҖ ?ВҖ???м•№кҪҰ ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ
  // datetime-local ??ISO UTC и№ӮВҖ??(йҮүлҡ®м”Ә?кі—?еӘӣВҖ жҝЎм’–лә„?лӯҠTC ?лЁ®лЈһ и№ӮВҖ??
  function toUTC(localStr) {
    if (!localStr) return null
    return new Date(localStr).toISOString()
  }

  async function handleAddEvent() {
    if (!form.event_name || !form.event_date) {
      showToast?.('?ВҖ?лҡ®мұёжҖЁ??мўҺмӯЁ???кҫ©лӢ”?лӮ…л•І??', 'error'); return
    }
    const insertData = {
      event_name: form.event_name,
      event_date: form.event_date,
      event_date_end: form.event_date_end || null,
      entry_fee_team: form.entry_fee_team ? Number(form.entry_fee_team) : 0,
      entry_open_at: toUTC(form.entry_open_at),
      entry_close_at: toUTC(form.entry_close_at),
      tournament_id: form.tournament_id || null,
      description: form.description || null,
      event_type: form.event_type,
      team_match_type: (form.event_type === 'team' || form.event_type === 'both') ? form.team_match_type : null,
      team_division_id: (form.event_type === 'team' || form.event_type === 'both') ? (form.team_division_id || null) : null,
      account_number: form.account_number || null,
      account_holder: form.account_holder || null,
      account_bank: form.account_bank || null,
    }
    const { error } = await supabase.from('events').insert([insertData])
    if (error) { showToast?.(error.message, 'error'); return }
    showToast?.('?ВҖ?лҡӯ? ?м•№кҪҰ?м„ҸлҝҖ?л“¬л•І??')
    setShowForm(false)
    setForm({
      event_name: '', event_date: '', event_date_end: '', entry_fee_team: '', entry_open_at: '', entry_close_at: '',
      description: '', tournament_id: '', event_type: 'individual', team_match_type: '3_doubles', team_division_id: '',
      account_number: '', account_holder: '', account_bank: '',
    })
    fetchAll()
  }

  // ?ВҖ?ВҖ ?ВҖ???м„Ҹм ҷ ?лӢҝлҰ° ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ
  // UTC ??datetime-local и№ӮВҖ??(йҮүлҡ®м”Ә?кі—?еӘӣВҖ ?лЁ®лЈһ?мҮ°мӨҲ жҝЎм’–лә„?м’“м»ҷ=KSTжҝЎ??м’–л–Ҷ)
  function toKSTLocal(utcStr) {
    if (!utcStr) return ''
    const d = new Date(utcStr)
    // datetime-local ?ләӨл–Ү: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM (жҝЎм’–лә„?м’“м»ҷ ж№Ікі—?)
    const pad = n => String(n).padStart(2, '0')
    return `${d.getFullYear()}-${pad(d.getMonth()+1)}-${pad(d.getDate())}T${pad(d.getHours())}:${pad(d.getMinutes())}`
  }

  function openEditModal(ev) {
    setEditingEvent(ev)
    setEditForm({
      event_name: ev.event_name || '',
      event_date: ev.event_date || '',
      event_date_end: ev.event_date_end || '',
      entry_fee_team: ev.entry_fee_team || '',
      entry_open_at: toKSTLocal(ev.entry_open_at),
      entry_close_at: toKSTLocal(ev.entry_close_at),
      description: ev.description || '',
      tournament_id: ev.tournament_id || '',
      account_number: ev.account_number || '',
      account_holder: ev.account_holder || '',
      account_bank: ev.account_bank || '',
    })
    setShowEditModal(true)
  }

  // ?ВҖ?ВҖ ?ВҖ???м„Ҹм ҷ ?ВҖ???ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ
  async function handleUpdateEvent() {
    if (!editForm.event_name || !editForm.event_date) {
      showToast?.('?ВҖ?лҡ®мұёжҖЁ??мўҺмӯЁ???кҫ©лӢ”?лӮ…л•І??', 'error'); return
    }
    const updates = {
      event_name: editForm.event_name,
      event_date: editForm.event_date,
      event_date_end: editForm.event_date_end || null,
      entry_fee_team: editForm.entry_fee_team ? Number(editForm.entry_fee_team) : 0,
      entry_open_at: toUTC(editForm.entry_open_at),
      entry_close_at: toUTC(editForm.entry_close_at),
      description: editForm.description || null,
      tournament_id: editForm.tournament_id || null,
      account_number: editForm.account_number || null,
      account_holder: editForm.account_holder || null,
      account_bank: editForm.account_bank || null,
    }
    const { error } = await supabase.from('events').update(updates).eq('event_id', editingEvent.event_id)
    if (error) { showToast?.(error.message, 'error'); return }
    showToast?.('?ВҖ???ләЈлӮ«еӘӣВҖ ?м„Ҹм ҷ?м„ҸлҝҖ?л“¬л•І??')
    setShowEditModal(false)
    setEditingEvent(null)
    // ?мўҸк№®???лҢҖк№Ҫ?лӘғлЈ„ еӘӣк№Ҷл–Ҡ
    if (selectedEvent?.event_id === editingEvent.event_id) {
      setSelectedEvent({ ...selectedEvent, ...updates })
    }
    fetchAll()
  }

  // ?ВҖ?ВҖ OPEN/CLOSED ?мўү? ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ
  async function toggleEventStatus(ev) {
    const newStatus = ev.status === 'OPEN' ? 'CLOSED' : 'OPEN'
    await supabase.from('events').update({ status: newStatus }).eq('event_id', ev.event_id)
    showToast?.(`${ev.event_name} ??${newStatus}`)
    fetchAll()
  }

  // ?ВҖ?ВҖ ?ВҖ????м Ј ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ
  async function handleDeleteEvent(ev) {
    const confirmMsg = `?мў‘нҲҳ "${ev.event_name}" ?ВҖ?лҡ®? ??м Ј?м„Ҹл–ҶеҜғмўҺл’ҝ?лҚҮнүҙ?\n\n?г…јм“¬ ?кі—м” ?кіҢ? п§Ҹв‘ӨлӘў ??м Ј?в‘ёл•І??\n- еӘӣм’–м”Ө??п§Ўл©ё??мўҺк»Ң и«ӣ?еҜғкі—м Ј?лҢҒлҝӯ\n- ?ВҖ??п§Ўл©ё??мўҺк»Ң и«ӣ??мўҺлӢ”п§ҸлӮ…л–’\n- йҒәВҖ?м’–м ҷи№Ӯ?n- AB еҜғмҺ„лҰ°еҜғкіҢлӮө\n\n???л¬’лҫҪ?ВҖ ?м„ҺлЈҺз”ұ????лҶҒл’ҝ?лҚҲл–Һ.`
    if (!confirm(confirmMsg)) return
    try {
      const eid = ev.event_id
      const { data: teamEntries } = await supabase.from('team_event_entries').select('id').eq('event_id', eid)
      if (teamEntries?.length > 0) {
        const entryIds = teamEntries.map(e => e.id)
        await supabase.from('team_event_members').delete().in('entry_id', entryIds)
      }
      await supabase.from('team_event_entries').delete().eq('event_id', eid)
      await supabase.from('payments').delete().eq('target_event_id', eid)
      await supabase.from('event_entries').delete().eq('event_id', eid)
      await supabase.from('app_b_match_results').delete().eq('event_id', eid)
      await supabase.from('event_divisions').delete().eq('event_id', eid)
      const { error } = await supabase.from('events').delete().eq('event_id', eid)
      if (error) throw error
      showToast?.(`"${ev.event_name}" ?ВҖ?лҡӯ? ??м Ј?м„ҸлҝҖ?л“¬л•І??`)
      setSelectedEvent(null)
      setEventDivisions([])
      fetchAll()
    } catch (err) {
      showToast?.('??м Ј ?г…ҪлҷЈ: ' + (err.message || '?????л…ҝл’— ?г…»мӘҹ'), 'error')
    }
  }

  // ?ВҖ?ВҖ ?ВҖ???г…јм ҷ ?м„Ҹм ҷ ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ
  async function handleUpdateTeamSettings() {
    if (!editingTeamSettings) return
    const updates = {
      event_type: editingTeamSettings.event_type,
      team_match_type: (editingTeamSettings.event_type === 'team' || editingTeamSettings.event_type === 'both')
        ? editingTeamSettings.team_match_type : null,
      team_division_id: (editingTeamSettings.event_type === 'team' || editingTeamSettings.event_type === 'both')
        ? (editingTeamSettings.team_division_id || null) : null,
    }
    const { error } = await supabase.from('events').update(updates).eq('event_id', editingTeamSettings.event_id)
    if (error) { showToast?.(error.message, 'error'); return }
    showToast?.('?ВҖ???г…јм ҷ???ВҖ?О»лҰә?лҚүл’ҝ?лҚҲл–Һ.')
    setEditingTeamSettings(null)
    fetchAll()
  }

  // ?ВҖ?ВҖ йҒәВҖ??з•°л¶Ҫ? ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ?ВҖ
  async function handleAddDivision() {
    if (!divForm.division_name || !selectedEvent) {
      showToast?.('йҒәВҖ?м’•мұё???лӮ…м °?лҢҒпјң?лӘ„мҠӮ.', 'error'); return
    }
    const { error } = await supabase.from('event_divisions').insert([{
      event_id: selectedEvent.event_id,
      division_name: divForm.division_name,
      has_groups: divForm.has_groups,
    }])
    if (error) { showToast?.(error.message, 'error'); return }
    showToast?.('йҒәВҖ?м’“? з•°л¶Ҫ??м„ҸлҝҖ?л“¬л•І??')
    setDivForm({ division_name: '', has_groups: false })
    fetchDivisions(selectedEvent.event_id)
  }

  async function deleteDivision(divId) {
    if (!confirm('??йҒәВҖ?м’•? ??м Ј?м„Ҹл–ҶеҜғмўҺл’ҝ?лҚҮнүҙ?')) return
    await supabase.from('event_divisions').delete().eq('division_id', divId)
    showToast?.('??м Ј??)
    if (selectedEvent) fetchDivisions(selectedEvent.event_id)
  }

  async function updateGroupsStatus(divId, status) {
    await supabase.from('event_divisions').update({ groups_status: status }).eq('division_id', divId)
    showToast?.('иӯ°кі•нҖҺз”ұСҲл Ү ?кі№к№ӯ и№ӮВҖеҜғ? ' + status)
    if (selectedEvent) fetchDivisions(selectedEvent.event_id)
  }

  function getEventTypeBadge(ev) {
    if (ev.event_type === 'team') return { label: '?ВҖ??, color: 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-700' }
    if (ev.event_type === 'both') return { label: 'еӘӣм’–м”Ө+?ВҖ', color: 'bg-purple-50 text-purple-700' }
    return { label: 'еӘӣм’–м”Ө', color: 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600' }
  }

  function getMatchTypeLabel(type) {
    if (type === '5_doubles') return '5и№Ӯл“ӯл–Ү'
    if (type === '3_doubles') return '3и№Ӯл“ӯл–Ү'
    return '-'
  }

  function formatDateTime(str) {
    if (!str) return '-'
    // KST(?м’“лҺ…?м’“м»ҷ) ж№Ікі—??мҮ°мӨҲ ?м’–л–Ҷ (UTC+9)
    return new Date(str).toLocaleString('ko-KR', {
      timeZone: 'Asia/Seoul',
      month: 'numeric',
      day: 'numeric',
      hour: '2-digit',
      minute: '2-digit',
      hour12: false,
    })
  }

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
        <h2 className="text-lg font-bold">?лҝҺ ?ВҖ???лҢҖк№Ҫ??ж„ҝВҖз”ұ?/h2>
        <button onClick={() => setShowForm(!showForm)}
          className="bg-accent text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-blue-700">
          + ?ВҖ?лҡҜк№®??        </button>
      </div>

      {/* ?ВҖ???м•№кҪҰ ??*/}
      {showForm && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-r border border-line p-4 mb-4 space-y-3">
          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-700">?мўүнҮӢ ?ВҖ???м•№кҪҰ</p>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
            <div className="col-span-2">
              <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?ВҖ?лҡ®мұё *</label>
              <input type="text" value={form.event_name}
                onChange={e => setForm({ ...form, event_name: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="?? 2026 йҒҠ??в‘Ҙл–Ү?ВҖ??
                className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?ВҖ???м’–мҳү??*</label>
              <input type="date" value={form.event_date}
                onChange={e => setForm({ ...form, event_date: e.target.value })}
                className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?ВҖ??йҶ«лӮ…мҰә??<span className="text-gray-400">(2?мҮұм” ??</span></label>
              <input type="date" value={form.event_date_end}
                min={form.event_date}
                onChange={e => setForm({ ...form, event_date_end: e.target.value })}
                className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
            </div>

            {/* ?ВҖ???мўҸмӮҺ */}
            <div className="col-span-2">
              <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?ВҖ???мўҸмӮҺ *</label>
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                {[
                  { value: 'individual', label: '?л«Җ еӘӣм’–м”Ө??, desc: 'еӘӣм’–м”Ө/и№Ӯл“ӯл–Ү еҜғмҺ„лҰ°' },
                  { value: 'team', label: '?л«Ғ ?ВҖ??, desc: '?лҢҖмқҮ ?ВҖ?ВҖ?? },
                  { value: 'both', label: '?л«Җ+?л«Ғ еӘӣм’–м”Ө+?ВҖ', desc: 'и№Ӯл“Ҝл№Җ ?лҢҒмҒә' },
                ].map(opt => (
                  <button key={opt.value} type="button"
                    onClick={() => setForm({ ...form, event_type: opt.value })}
                    className={`flex-1 p-3 rounded-lg border text-left transition-colors ${
                      form.event_type === opt.value ? 'border-accent bg-accentSoft' : 'border-line hover:bg-soft'
                    }`}>
                    <div className="text-sm font-medium">{opt.label}</div>
                    <div className="text-xs text-sub mt-0.5">{opt.desc}</div>
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {(form.event_type === 'team' || form.event_type === 'both') && (
              <div>
                <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">еҜғмҺ„лҰ° и«ӣв‘№л–Ү *</label>
                <select value={form.team_match_type}
                  onChange={e => setForm({ ...form, team_match_type: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                  <option value="3_doubles">3и№Ӯл“ӯл–Ү (2???мўҺл“…)</option>
                  <option value="5_doubles">5и№Ӯл“ӯл–Ү (3???мўҺл“…)</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            )}

            <div>
              <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">п§Ўл©ё?йҚ®?(?ВҖ/??</label>
              <input type="number" value={form.entry_fee_team}
                onChange={e => setForm({ ...form, entry_fee_team: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="0"
                className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
            </div>

            {/* жҖЁкҫ©мҘ– ?ләЈлӮ« */}
            <div className="col-span-2">
              <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?л®© ?лӮғнҲ‘ жҖЁкҫ©мҘ–</label>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                <input type="text" value={form.account_bank}
                  onChange={e => setForm({ ...form, account_bank: e.target.value })}
                  placeholder="?ВҖ?лҗ°мұё"
                  className="text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
                <input type="text" value={form.account_number}
                  onChange={e => setForm({ ...form, account_number: e.target.value })}
                  placeholder="жҖЁкҫ©мҘ–иё°лҚҠмғҮ"
                  className="text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
                <input type="text" value={form.account_holder}
                  onChange={e => setForm({ ...form, account_holder: e.target.value })}
                  placeholder="?лҚҮнҲ‘дәҢ?
                  className="text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?мўҺк»Ң ?м’–мҳү</label>
              <input type="datetime-local" value={form.entry_open_at}
                onChange={e => setForm({ ...form, entry_open_at: e.target.value })}
                className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?мўҺк»Ң п§ҚлҚҮм»§</label>
              <input type="datetime-local" value={form.entry_close_at}
                onChange={e => setForm({ ...form, entry_close_at: e.target.value })}
                className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
            </div>
            <div className="col-span-2">
              <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?кіҢк»җ ?ВҖ??п§ҚлҚүл’Ә??(?мўҸк№®)</label>
              <select value={form.tournament_id}
                onChange={e => setForm({ ...form, tournament_id: e.target.value })}
                className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                <option value="">?лҶҒм“¬</option>
                {tournaments.map(t => (
                  <option key={t.tournament_id} value={t.tournament_id}>{t.tournament_name}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <button onClick={handleAddEvent}
              className="bg-accent text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm">?м•№кҪҰ</button>
            <button onClick={() => setShowForm(false)}
              className="text-sm text-sub px-4 py-2">з—Қв‘Ҙлғј</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ?ВҖ??п§Ҹв‘ёмӨү */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-r border border-line overflow-x-auto mb-4">
        <table className="w-full text-sm">
          <thead className="bg-soft2">
            <tr>
              <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left text-sub font-medium">?ВҖ?лҡ®мұё</th>
              <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left text-sub font-medium">?мўҺмӯЁ</th>
              <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left text-sub font-medium">?мўҺк»Ңж№ІкіҢм»ҷ</th>
              <th className="px-3 py-2 text-center text-sub font-medium">?мўҸмӮҺ</th>
              <th className="px-3 py-2 text-center text-sub font-medium">?кі№к№ӯ</th>
              <th className="px-3 py-2 text-center text-sub font-medium">?л“ӯлҖЎ</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {loading ? (
              <tr><td colSpan={6} className="text-center py-8 text-sub">жҝЎм’•лө« д»Ҙ?.</td></tr>
            ) : events.map(ev => {
              const badge = getEventTypeBadge(ev)
              return (
                <tr key={ev.event_id}
                  className={`border-t border-line hover:bg-soft cursor-pointer ${selectedEvent?.event_id === ev.event_id ? 'bg-accentSoft' : ''}`}
                  onClick={() => { setSelectedEvent(ev); fetchDivisions(ev.event_id); setEditingTeamSettings(null) }}>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2 font-medium">{ev.event_name}</td>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2 text-sub">{ev.event_date}</td>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2 text-xs text-sub">
                    {ev.entry_open_at || ev.entry_close_at ? (
                      <span>{formatDateTime(ev.entry_open_at)} ~ {formatDateTime(ev.entry_close_at)}</span>
                    ) : <span className="text-gray-300">иӘҳлӘ„кҪ•??/span>}
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2 text-center">
                    <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${badge.color}`}>{badge.label}</span>
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2 text-center">
                    <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded ${ev.status === 'OPEN' ? 'bg-green-50 text-green-700' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500'}`}>
                      {ev.status}
                    </span>
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2 text-center">
                    <div className="flex gap-2 justify-center">
                      <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); openEditModal(ev) }}
                        className="text-xs text-blue-500 hover:underline">?м„Ҹм ҷ</button>
                      <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); toggleEventStatus(ev) }}
                        className="text-xs text-accent hover:underline">
                        {ev.status === 'OPEN' ? 'п§ҚлҚҮм»§' : '?г…ҪлөӮ'}
                      </button>
                      <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDeleteEvent(ev) }}
                        className="text-xs text-red-500 hover:underline">??м Ј</button>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              )
            })}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>

      {/* ?мўҸк№®???ВҖ?лҡҜм“Ҫ ?ВҖ???г…јм ҷ */}
      {selectedEvent && (selectedEvent.event_type === 'team' || selectedEvent.event_type === 'both') && (
        <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-lg border border-blue-200 p-4 mb-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
            <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-blue-800">?л«Ғ ?ВҖ???г…јм ҷ</h3>
            {!editingTeamSettings ? (
              <button onClick={() => setEditingTeamSettings({ ...selectedEvent })}
                className="text-xs text-blue-600 hover:underline">?м„Ҹм ҷ</button>
            ) : (
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <button onClick={handleUpdateTeamSettings}
                  className="text-xs bg-blue-600 text-white px-3 py-1 rounded">?ВҖ??/button>
                <button onClick={() => setEditingTeamSettings(null)}
                  className="text-xs text-sub">з—Қв‘Ҙлғј</button>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
          {editingTeamSettings ? (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
              <div>
                <label className="block text-xs text-blue-700 mb-1">?ВҖ???мўҸмӮҺ</label>
                <select value={editingTeamSettings.event_type}
                  onChange={e => setEditingTeamSettings({ ...editingTeamSettings, event_type: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full text-sm border border-blue-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                  <option value="individual">еӘӣм’–м”Ө??/option>
                  <option value="team">?ВҖ??/option>
                  <option value="both">еӘӣм’–м”Ө+?ВҖ</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-xs text-blue-700 mb-1">еҜғмҺ„лҰ° и«ӣв‘№л–Ү</label>
                <select value={editingTeamSettings.team_match_type || '3_doubles'}
                  onChange={e => setEditingTeamSettings({ ...editingTeamSettings, team_match_type: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full text-sm border border-blue-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                  <option value="3_doubles">3и№Ӯл“ӯл–Ү (2???мўҺл“…)</option>
                  <option value="5_doubles">5и№Ӯл“ӯл–Ү (3???мўҺл“…)</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div className="col-span-2">
                <label className="block text-xs text-blue-700 mb-1">?ВҖ??п§Ўл©ё?йҒәВҖ??/label>
                <select value={editingTeamSettings.team_division_id || ''}
                  onChange={e => setEditingTeamSettings({ ...editingTeamSettings, team_division_id: e.target.value || null })}
                  className="w-full text-sm border border-blue-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                  <option value="">иӘҳл©ёк»җ??/option>
                  {eventDivisions.map(d => (
                    <option key={d.division_id} value={d.division_id}>{d.division_name}</option>
                  ))}
                </select>
                {eventDivisions.length === 0 && (
                  <p className="text-xs text-blue-600 mt-1">?кҫЁмҳ’?лЁҜкҪҢ йҒәВҖ?м’•? зҷ’мҮұ? з•°л¶Ҫ??м„ҸкҪӯ??</p>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 text-sm">
              <div>
                <span className="text-xs text-blue-600">?мўҸмӮҺ</span>
                <p className="font-medium">{getEventTypeBadge(selectedEvent).label}</p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span className="text-xs text-blue-600">еҜғмҺ„лҰ°и«ӣв‘№л–Ү</span>
                <p className="font-medium">{getMatchTypeLabel(selectedEvent.team_match_type)}</p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span className="text-xs text-blue-600">п§Ўл©ё?йҒәВҖ??/span>
                <p className="font-medium">
                  {selectedEvent.team_division_id
                    ? (eventDivisions.find(d => d.division_id === selectedEvent.team_division_id)?.division_name || 'иӘҳлӘ„лҝ°еҜғ?)
                    : 'иӘҳл©ёк»җ??}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ?мўҸк№®???ВҖ?лҡҜм“Ҫ йҒәВҖ??ж„ҝВҖз”ұ?*/}
      {selectedEvent && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-r border border-line p-4">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-bold mb-1">?лұҘ {selectedEvent.event_name} - йҒәВҖ??ж„ҝВҖз”ұ?/h3>

          {/* ?ВҖ??еӘӣм’–м”Ө???лҚҲк¶Ў */}
          {(selectedEvent.event_type === 'team' || selectedEvent.event_type === 'both') ? (
            <p className="text-xs text-blue-600 mb-3">?л«Ғ ?лҢҖмқҮ?ВҖ??мҹҫ йҒәВҖ????п§һкіём ’ ?лӮ…м °?м„ҸкҪӯ?? (?? ?в‘ҘкҪҰйҒәВҖ, ?СҠкҪҰйҒәВҖ, ?мҮұкҪҰйҒәВҖ)</p>
          ) : (
            <p className="text-xs text-sub mb-3">?лұӨ еӘӣм’–м”Ө??йҒәВҖ?????СҠм”Ө??жҙ№м’–м ҷ п§Ҹв‘ёмӨү?лЁҜкҪҢ ?мўҸк№®?м„ҸкҪӯ??</p>
          )}

          {/* йҒәВҖ??з•°л¶Ҫ? */}
          <div className="flex gap-2 mb-3">
            <div className="flex-1">
              {/* ?ВҖ?? п§һкіём ’ ?лӮ…м ° */}
              {(selectedEvent.event_type === 'team' || selectedEvent.event_type === 'both') ? (
                <input
                  type="text"
                  value={divForm.division_name}
                  onChange={e => setDivForm({ ...divForm, division_name: e.target.value })}
                  placeholder="йҒәВҖ?м’•мұё п§һкіём ’ ?лӮ…м ° (?? ?в‘ҘкҪҰйҒәВҖ, ?СҠкҪҰйҒәВҖ)"
                  className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
              ) : (
                /* еӘӣм’–м”Ө?? ?СҠм”Ө??жҙ№м’–м ҷ ?м’•вҲј?г…јмҠ« */
                <select
                  value={divForm.division_name}
                  onChange={e => setDivForm({ ...divForm, division_name: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                  <option value="">йҒәВҖ???мўҸк№® (?СҠм”Ө??жҙ№м’–м ҷ ж№Ікі—?)</option>
                  {pointRuleDivisions.map(d => (
                    <option key={d} value={d}>{d}</option>
                  ))}
                </select>
              )}
            </div>
            <label className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-sub shrink-0">
              <input type="checkbox" checked={divForm.has_groups}
                onChange={e => setDivForm({ ...divForm, has_groups: e.target.checked })} />
              иӯ°кі•нҖҺз”ұСҲл Ү
            </label>
            <button onClick={handleAddDivision}
              className="bg-accent text-white px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm shrink-0">з•°л¶Ҫ?</button>
          </div>

          {selectedEvent.event_type === 'individual' && pointRuleDivisions.length === 0 && (
            <p className="text-xs text-amber-600 mb-3">?мў‘нҲҳ ?СҠм”Ө??жҙ№м’–м ҷ??йҒәВҖ?м’“? ?лҶҒл’ҝ?лҚҲл–Һ. зҷ’мҮұ? ?СҠм”Ө??жҙ№м’–м ҷ?лЁҜкҪҢ йҒәВҖ?м’•? з•°л¶Ҫ??лҢҒпјң?лӘ„мҠӮ.</p>
          )}

          {/* йҒәВҖ??п§Ҹв‘ёмӨү */}
          <div className="space-y-1">
            {eventDivisions.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-sm text-sub py-4 text-center">?к№…мӨү??йҒәВҖ?м’“? ?лҶҒл’ҝ?лҚҲл–Һ.</p>
            ) : eventDivisions.map(d => (
              <div key={d.division_id} className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 px-3 bg-soft rounded-lg">
                <div>
                  <span className="text-sm font-medium">{d.division_name}</span>
                  {d.has_groups && (
                    <span className={`ml-2 text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded ${
                      d.groups_status === 'COMPLETED' ? 'bg-green-50 text-green-700' :
                      d.groups_status === 'IN_PROGRESS' ? 'bg-yellow-50 text-yellow-700' :
                      'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500'
                    }`}>{d.groups_status}</span>
                  )}
                  {selectedEvent.team_division_id === d.division_id && (
                    <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">?л«Ғ?ВҖ??йҒәВҖ??/span>
                  )}
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-1">
                  {d.has_groups && d.groups_status !== 'COMPLETED' && (
                    <>
                      {d.groups_status === 'NONE' && (
                        <button onClick={() => updateGroupsStatus(d.division_id, 'IN_PROGRESS')}
                          className="text-xs text-yellow-600 hover:underline">иӯ°кі•нҖҺ?м’–мҳү</button>
                      )}
                      <button onClick={() => updateGroupsStatus(d.division_id, 'COMPLETED')}
                        className="text-xs text-green-600 hover:underline">иӯ°кі•нҖҺ?кҫЁмҰә</button>
                    </>
                  )}
                  <button onClick={() => deleteDivision(d.division_id)}
                    className="text-xs text-red-500 hover:underline">??м Ј</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ?ВҖ???м„Ҹм ҷ п§Ҹв‘Өл–– */}
      {showEditModal && editingEvent && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/40 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-6 w-full max-w-md max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
            <h3 className="text-base font-bold mb-4">?лҘ…нҲҳ ?ВҖ???ләЈлӮ« ?м„Ҹм ҷ</h3>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <div>
                <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?ВҖ?лҡ®мұё *</label>
                <input type="text" value={editForm.event_name}
                  onChange={e => setEditForm({ ...editForm, event_name: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
              </div>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?ВҖ???м’–мҳү??*</label>
                  <input type="date" value={editForm.event_date}
                    onChange={e => setEditForm({ ...editForm, event_date: e.target.value })}
                    className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?ВҖ??йҶ«лӮ…мҰә??<span className="text-gray-400">(2?мҮұм” ??</span></label>
                  <input type="date" value={editForm.event_date_end}
                    min={editForm.event_date}
                    onChange={e => setEditForm({ ...editForm, event_date_end: e.target.value })}
                    className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">п§Ўл©ё?йҚ®?(??</label>
                  <input type="number" value={editForm.entry_fee_team}
                    onChange={e => setEditForm({ ...editForm, entry_fee_team: e.target.value })}
                    className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* жҖЁкҫ©мҘ– ?ләЈлӮ« */}
              <div>
                <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?л®© ?лӮғнҲ‘ жҖЁкҫ©мҘ–</label>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                  <input type="text" value={editForm.account_bank}
                    onChange={e => setEditForm({ ...editForm, account_bank: e.target.value })}
                    placeholder="?ВҖ?лҗ°мұё"
                    className="text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
                  <input type="text" value={editForm.account_number}
                    onChange={e => setEditForm({ ...editForm, account_number: e.target.value })}
                    placeholder="жҖЁкҫ©мҘ–иё°лҚҠмғҮ"
                    className="text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
                  <input type="text" value={editForm.account_holder}
                    onChange={e => setEditForm({ ...editForm, account_holder: e.target.value })}
                    placeholder="?лҚҮнҲ‘дәҢ?
                    className="text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
                </div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?мўҺк»Ң ?м’–мҳү</label>
                <input type="datetime-local" value={editForm.entry_open_at}
                  onChange={e => setEditForm({ ...editForm, entry_open_at: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?мўҺк»Ң п§ҚлҚҮм»§</label>
                <input type="datetime-local" value={editForm.entry_close_at}
                  onChange={e => setEditForm({ ...editForm, entry_close_at: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?кіҢк»җ ?ВҖ??п§ҚлҚүл’Ә??/label>
                <select value={editForm.tournament_id}
                  onChange={e => setEditForm({ ...editForm, tournament_id: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                  <option value="">?лҶҒм“¬</option>
                  {tournaments.map(t => (
                    <option key={t.tournament_id} value={t.tournament_id}>{t.tournament_name}</option>
                  ))}
                </select>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-xs text-sub mb-1">?г…»мұё</label>
                <textarea value={editForm.description}
                  onChange={e => setEditForm({ ...editForm, description: e.target.value })}
                  rows={2}
                  className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2 resize-none" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-2 mt-5">
              <button onClick={() => { setShowEditModal(false); setEditingEvent(null) }}
                className="flex-1 py-2 border border-line rounded-lg text-sm text-sub">з—Қв‘Ҙлғј</button>
              <button onClick={handleUpdateEvent}
                className="flex-1 py-2 bg-accent text-white rounded-lg text-sm font-medium">?ВҖ??/button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
// ========== C:\Users\homem\OneDrive\л°”нғ• нҷ”л©ҙ\jeju-tennis-app\src\pages\admin\EventEntryPage.jsx ==========
import { useState, useEffect, useContext } from 'react'
import { supabase } from '../lib/supabase'
import PageHeader from '../components/PageHeader'
import { ToastContext } from '../App'

export default function EventEntryPage() {
  const showToast = useContext(ToastContext)
  const [events, setEvents] = useState([])
  const [divisions, setDivisions] = useState([])
  const [members, setMembers] = useState([])
  const [selectedEvent, setSelectedEvent] = useState(null)
  const [selectedDivision, setSelectedDivision] = useState('')
  const [member1Search, setMember1Search] = useState('')
  const [member2Search, setMember2Search] = useState('')
  const [member1Id, setMember1Id] = useState('')
  const [member2Id, setMember2Id] = useState('')
  const [member1Pin, setMember1Pin] = useState('')
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false)
  const [showDropdown1, setShowDropdown1] = useState(false)
  const [showDropdown2, setShowDropdown2] = useState(false)

  useEffect(() => { fetchEvents(); fetchMembers() }, [])

  async function fetchEvents() {
    const { data } = await supabase.from('events')
      .select('*')
      .eq('status', 'OPEN')
      .order('event_date', { ascending: false })
    setEvents(data || [])
  }

  async function fetchMembers() {
    const { data } = await supabase.from('members_public')
      .select('member_id, name, display_name, club, division, grade, status')
      .neq('status', '?лҚҠлҲң').order('name')
    setMembers(data || [])
  }

  async function fetchDivisions(eventId) {
    const { data } = await supabase.from('event_divisions').select('*').eq('event_id', eventId).order('division_name')
    setDivisions(data || [])
  }

  function handleEventChange(eventId) {
    const ev = events.find(e => e.event_id === eventId)
    setSelectedEvent(ev || null); setSelectedDivision('')
    if (eventId) fetchDivisions(eventId); else setDivisions([])
  }

  // п§Ўл©ё??мўҺк»Ң еӘӣВҖ???Сү? п§ЈлҢ„кІ•
  function getEntryAvailability(ev) {
    if (!ev) return { ok: false, message: '' }
    const now = new Date()
    if (ev.entry_open_at && new Date(ev.entry_open_at) > now) {
      const d = new Date(ev.entry_open_at)
      const msg = `${d.getMonth() + 1}/${d.getDate()} ${String(d.getHours()).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0')} йҒәВҖ???мўҺк»Ң еӘӣВҖ?ОҪл№Җ?лҚҲл–Һ.`
      return { ok: false, message: msg, type: 'notYet' }
    }
    if (ev.entry_close_at && new Date(ev.entry_close_at) < now) {
      return { ok: false, message: 'п§Ўл©ё??мўҺк»Ң п§ҚлҚҮм»§???ВҖ?лҡҜм—Ҝ?лҚҲл–Һ.', type: 'closed' }
    }
    return { ok: true, message: '' }
  }

  function filterMembers(query) {
    if (!query.trim()) return []
    const q = query.trim().toLowerCase()
    return members.filter(m =>
      (m.name || '').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      (m.display_name || '').toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      (m.member_id || '').toLowerCase().includes(q)
    ).slice(0, 8)
  }

  function getMemberInfo(memberId) {
    const m = members.find(m => m.member_id === memberId)
    if (!m) return null
    return { ...m, isActive: m.status === '?м’–кҪҰ' }
  }

  async function handleSubmit() {
    if (!selectedEvent || !selectedDivision || !member1Id || !member2Id) {
      showToast?.('?ВҖ?? йҒәВҖ?? ?мўҺлӢ” 2п§ҸлӮҶм“Ј п§Ҹв‘ӨлӘў ?мўҸк№®?лҢҒпјң?лӘ„мҠӮ.', 'error'); return
    }
    if (!member1Pin || member1Pin.length !== 6) {
      showToast?.('PIN 6?лЁ®в”Ғз‘ң??лӮ…м °?лҢҒпјң?лӘ„мҠӮ.', 'error'); return
    }

    // п§Ўл©ё??мўҺк»Ң ?м’“м»ҷ п§ЈлҢ„кІ•
    const avail = getEntryAvailability(selectedEvent)
    if (!avail.ok) {
      showToast?.('?мў‘нҲҳ ' + avail.message, 'error'); return
    }

    setSubmitting(true)

    // 1?в‘ЈнҖҺ: PIN еҜғВҖп§қ?    const { data: pinData, error: pinError } = await supabase.rpc('rpc_verify_member_pin', {
      p_name: members.find(m => m.member_id === member1Id)?.name || '',
      p_pin: member1Pin,
    })
    if (pinError) { showToast?.('PIN ?лӘ„м¬Ҷ ?г…ҪлҷЈ: ' + pinError.message, 'error'); setSubmitting(false); return }
    if (pinData && !pinData.ok) { showToast?.('?мў‘нҲҳ ' + pinData.message, 'error'); setSubmitting(false); return }
    if (pinData && pinData.ok && pinData.member_id !== member1Id) {
      showToast?.('?мў‘нҲҳ PINжҖЁ??мўҸк№®???мўҺлӢ”еӘӣВҖ ?мҮұнҠӮ?м„Ҹ? ?л”Ҷл’ҝ?лҚҲл–Һ.', 'error'); setSubmitting(false); return
    }

    // 2?в‘ЈнҖҺ: RPC ?лӘ„н…§
    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('rpc_apply_team_to_event', {
      p_event_id: selectedEvent.event_id, p_division_id: selectedDivision,
      p_member1_id: member1Id, p_member2_id: member2Id,
    })
    if (error) { showToast?.('?мўҺк»Ң ?г…ҪлҷЈ: ' + error.message, 'error') }
    else if (data && !data.ok) { showToast?.('?мў‘нҲҳ ' + (data.message || '?мўҺк»Ң?????лҶҒл’ҝ?лҚҲл–Һ.'), 'error') }
    else if (data && data.ok) {
      showToast?.('?л ұ п§Ўл©ё? ?мўҺк»Ң ?кҫЁмҰә!')
      setMember1Id(''); setMember2Id(''); setMember1Search(''); setMember2Search(''); setMember1Pin('')
    }
    setSubmitting(false)
  }

  const member1Info = getMemberInfo(member1Id)
  const member2Info = getMemberInfo(member2Id)
  const entryAvail = getEntryAvailability(selectedEvent)

  return (
    <div className="pb-20">
      <PageHeader title="?л ұ п§Ўл©ё??мўҺк»Ң" subtitle="и№Ӯл“ӯл–Ү и«ӣ??в‘Ҙл–Ү п§Ўл©ё? ?мўҺк»Ң" />
      <div className="max-w-lg mx-auto px-5 py-4 space-y-4">
        <div className="bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-lg p-3">
          <p className="text-xs text-amber-700">?мў‘нҲҳ ?мўҺлӢ” 2п§Ҹ?п§Ҹв‘ӨлӘў <b>?к№…мӨү?м„ҚнҖ¬ ?м’–кҪҰ(?м’–кҪҰ ?лҡҜмҚқ)</b>?лҢҒлјұ??п§Ўл©ё? ?мўҺк»Ң??еӘӣВҖ?ОҪл№Җ?лҚҲл–Һ.</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-amber-700 mt-1">?лөҚ ?мўҺк»Ң???мўҺлӢ”1)??<b>PIN 6?лЁ®в”Ғ</b>з‘ң??лӮ…м °?лҢҒл№һ ?в‘ёл•І??</p>
        </div>

        {/* ?ВҖ???мўҸк№® */}
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">?ВҖ???мўҸк№®</label>
          <select value={selectedEvent?.event_id || ''} onChange={e => handleEventChange(e.target.value)}
            className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5">
            <option value="">?ВҖ?лҡ®? ?мўҸк№®?м„ҸкҪӯ??/option>
            {events.map(ev => (
              <option key={ev.event_id} value={ev.event_id}>
                {ev.event_name} ({ev.event_date}){ev.entry_fee_team ? ` - ${ev.entry_fee_team.toLocaleString()}?? : ''}
              </option>
            ))}
          </select>
          {events.length === 0 && <p className="text-xs text-sub mt-1">?кҫ©мҳұ ?мўҺк»Ң еӘӣВҖ?ОҪлёі ?ВҖ?лҡӯ? ?лҶҒл’ҝ?лҚҲл–Һ.</p>}
        </div>

        {/* ?ВҖ???ләЈлӮ« + ?мўҺк»Ң еӘӣВҖ???Сү? */}
        {selectedEvent && (
          <div className={`rounded-lg p-3 ${entryAvail.ok ? 'bg-green-50 border border-green-200' : 'bg-red-50 border border-red-200'}`}>
            <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-800">{selectedEvent.event_name}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-sub mt-1">?лұҹ {selectedEvent.event_date}
              {selectedEvent.entry_fee_team > 0 && ` мЁҢ ?л®Ҙ ${selectedEvent.entry_fee_team.toLocaleString()}??}</p>
            {!entryAvail.ok ? (
              <p className={`text-xs mt-1 font-medium ${entryAvail.type === 'notYet' ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-red-600'}`}>
                {entryAvail.type === 'notYet' ? '?? : '?лөҸ'} {entryAvail.message}
              </p>
            ) : (
              <p className="text-xs text-green-600 mt-1 font-medium">??п§һВҖж№І??мўҺк»Ң еӘӣВҖ?ОҪл№Җ?лҚҲл–Һ.</p>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ?мўҺк»Ң еӘӣВҖ?ОҪлёі еҜғмҺҢмҠҰ?лЁ®мӯ” ?кҫЁмҳ’ ???м’–л–Ҷ */}
        {selectedEvent && entryAvail.ok && (
          <>
            {/* йҒәВҖ???мўҸк№® */}
            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">йҒәВҖ???мўҸк№®</label>
              <select value={selectedDivision} onChange={e => setSelectedDivision(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5">
                <option value="">йҒәВҖ?м’•? ?мўҸк№®?м„ҸкҪӯ??/option>
                {divisions.map(d => <option key={d.division_id} value={d.division_id}>{d.division_name}</option>)}
              </select>
            </div>

            {selectedDivision && (
              <>
                {/* ?мўҺлӢ” 1 */}
                <div className="relative">
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">?мўҺлӢ” 1 (?мўҺк»Ң??</label>
                  <input type="text" value={member1Search}
                    onChange={e => { setMember1Search(e.target.value); setMember1Id(''); setMember1Pin(''); setShowDropdown1(true) }}
                    onFocus={() => setShowDropdown1(true)}
                    placeholder="?лҢҖм«« еҜғВҖ??."
                    className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5" />
                  {member1Info && (
                    <div className={`mt-1 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs ${member1Info.isActive ? 'bg-green-50 text-green-700' : 'bg-red-50 text-red-600'}`}>
                      {member1Info.name} мЁҢ {member1Info.club || '-'} мЁҢ {member1Info.grade || '-'}
                      {member1Info.isActive ? ' ?лӮҮмҶў?? : ' ?мў‘нҲҳ?к№…мӨүйҚ®кҫЁ???}
                    </div>
                  )}
                  {showDropdown1 && filterMembers(member1Search).length > 0 && (
                    <div className="absolute left-0 right-0 top-full bg-white border border-line rounded-lg shadow-lg mt-1 z-20 max-h-48 overflow-y-auto">
                      {filterMembers(member1Search).map(m => (
                        <button key={m.member_id}
                          onClick={() => { setMember1Id(m.member_id); setMember1Search(m.display_name || m.name); setShowDropdown1(false); setMember1Pin('') }}
                          className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2.5 text-sm hover:bg-soft border-b border-line/30">
                          <span className="font-medium">{m.display_name || m.name}</span>
                          <span className="text-sub text-xs ml-2">{m.club || ''} мЁҢ {m.grade || ''}</span>
                          <span className={`text-xs ml-2 ${m.status === '?м’–кҪҰ' ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-red-500'}`}>
                            {m.status === '?м’–кҪҰ' ? '?? : '?мў‘нҲҳ'}
                          </span>
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>

                {/* PIN */}
                {member1Id && (
                  <div>
                    <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">?лөҚ PIN (6?лЁ®в”Ғ)</label>
                    <input type="password" inputMode="numeric" maxLength={6} value={member1Pin}
                      onChange={e => setMember1Pin(e.target.value.replace(/\D/g, '').slice(0, 6))}
                      placeholder="PIN 6?лЁ®в”Ғ ?лӮ…м °"
                      className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 tracking-widest" />
                    {member1Pin.length > 0 && member1Pin.length < 6 && (
                      <p className="text-xs text-red-500 mt-1">{6 - member1Pin.length}?лЁ®в”Ғ ???лӮ…м °?лҢҒпјң?лӘ„мҠӮ</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                )}

                {/* ?мўҺлӢ” 2 */}
                <div className="relative">
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">?мўҺлӢ” 2</label>
                  <input type="text" value={member2Search}
                    onChange={e => { setMember2Search(e.target.value); setMember2Id(''); setShowDropdown2(true) }}
                    onFocus={() => setShowDropdown2(true)}
                    placeholder="?лҢҖм«« еҜғВҖ??."
                    className="w-full text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5" />
                  {member2Info && (
                    <div className={`mt-1 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs ${member2Info.isActive ? 'bg-green-50 text-green-700' : 'bg-red-50 text-red-600'}`}>
                      {member2Info.name} мЁҢ {member2Info.club || '-'} мЁҢ {member2Info.grade || '-'}
                      {member2Info.isActive ? ' ?лӮҮмҶў?? : ' ?мў‘нҲҳ?к№…мӨүйҚ®кҫЁ???}
                    </div>
                  )}
                  {showDropdown2 && filterMembers(member2Search).length > 0 && (
                    <div className="absolute left-0 right-0 top-full bg-white border border-line rounded-lg shadow-lg mt-1 z-20 max-h-48 overflow-y-auto">
                      {filterMembers(member2Search).map(m => (
                        <button key={m.member_id}
                          onClick={() => { setMember2Id(m.member_id); setMember2Search(m.display_name || m.name); setShowDropdown2(false) }}
                          className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2.5 text-sm hover:bg-soft border-b border-line/30">
                          <span className="font-medium">{m.display_name || m.name}</span>
                          <span className="text-sub text-xs ml-2">{m.club || ''} мЁҢ {m.grade || ''}</span>
                          <span className={`text-xs ml-2 ${m.status === '?м’–кҪҰ' ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-red-500'}`}>
                            {m.status === '?м’–кҪҰ' ? '?? : '?мў‘нҲҳ'}
                          </span>
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>

                <button onClick={handleSubmit}
                  disabled={submitting || !member1Id || !member2Id || member1Pin.length !== 6}
                  className="w-full bg-accent text-white py-3 rounded-lg font-semibold text-sm
                    hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed">
                  {submitting ? '?мўҺк»Ң д»Ҙ?.' : '?л ұ п§Ўл©ё? ?мўҺк»Ң?м„ҚлҰ°'}
                </button>
              </>
            )}
          </>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
// ========== C:\Users\homem\OneDrive\л°”нғ• нҷ”л©ҙ\jeju-tennis-app\src\pages\admin\GradeAdmin.jsx ==========
import { useState, useEffect, useContext } from 'react'
import { supabase } from '../../lib/supabase'
import { ToastContext } from '../../App'

export default function GradeAdmin() {
  const showToast = useContext(ToastContext)
  const [grades, setGrades] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [newGrade, setNewGrade] = useState('')

  useEffect(() => { fetchGrades() }, [])

  async function fetchGrades() {
    setLoading(true)
    const { data } = await supabase.from('grade_options').select('*').order('sort_order')
    setGrades(data || [])
    setLoading(false)
  }

  async function handleAdd() {
    if (!newGrade.trim()) { showToast?.('?к№ғнҲ’???лӮ…м °?лҢҒпјң?лӘ„мҠӮ.', 'error'); return }
    const maxOrder = grades.length > 0 ? Math.max(...grades.map(g => g.sort_order)) + 1 : 1
    const { error } = await supabase.from('grade_options').insert([{
      grade_value: newGrade.trim(),
      sort_order: maxOrder,
      active: true,
    }])
    if (error) { showToast?.('з•°л¶Ҫ? ?г…ҪлҷЈ: ' + error.message, 'error'); return }
    showToast?.('?к№ғнҲ’ з•°л¶Ҫ? ?кҫЁмҰә')
    setNewGrade('')
    fetchGrades()
  }

  async function handleToggle(id, active) {
    await supabase.from('grade_options').update({ active: !active }).eq('id', id)
    showToast?.(!active ? '?м’–кҪҰ?л¶ҫл§–' : 'йҚ®кҫӘмҶў?к№ҠмҶ•??)
    fetchGrades()
  }

  async function handleDelete(id) {
    if (!confirm('???к№ғнҲ’????м Ј?м„Ҹл–ҶеҜғмўҺл’ҝ?лҚҮнүҙ?')) return
    await supabase.from('grade_options').delete().eq('id', id)
    showToast?.('??м Ј??)
    fetchGrades()
  }

  async function handleMove(id, direction) {
    const idx = grades.findIndex(g => g.id === id)
    if (idx < 0) return
    const swapIdx = direction === 'up' ? idx - 1 : idx + 1
    if (swapIdx < 0 || swapIdx >= grades.length) return

    const currentOrder = grades[idx].sort_order
    const swapOrder = grades[swapIdx].sort_order

    await Promise.all([
      supabase.from('grade_options').update({ sort_order: swapOrder }).eq('id', grades[idx].id),
      supabase.from('grade_options').update({ sort_order: currentOrder }).eq('id', grades[swapIdx].id),
    ])
    fetchGrades()
  }

  return (
    <div>
      <h2 className="text-lg font-bold mb-4">?лұӨ ?к№ғнҲ’ ж„ҝВҖз”ұ?/h2>
      <p className="text-xs text-sub mb-4">?лҡҜмҚқеӘӣВҖ?????мўҸк№® еӘӣВҖ?ОҪлёі ?к№ғнҲ’ п§Ҹв‘ёмӨү??ж„ҝВҖз”ұСӢл№Җ?лҚҲл–Һ. ?м’–кҪҢ и№ӮВҖеҜғ? з•°л¶Ҫ?, ??м ЈеӘӣВҖ еӘӣВҖ?ОҪл№Җ?лҚҲл–Һ.</p>

      {/* ?к№ғнҲ’ з•°л¶Ҫ? */}
      <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4">
        <input type="text" value={newGrade} onChange={e => setNewGrade(e.target.value)}
          placeholder="???к№ғнҲ’ ?лӮ…м ° (?? 7)"
          className="flex-1 text-sm border border-line rounded-lg px-3 py-2"
          onKeyDown={e => e.key === 'Enter' && handleAdd()} />
        <button onClick={handleAdd}
          className="bg-accent text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-blue-700">
          з•°л¶Ҫ?
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* ?к№ғнҲ’ п§Ҹв‘ёмӨү */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-line">
        {loading ? (
          <p className="text-center py-8 text-sub text-sm">жҝЎм’•лө« д»Ҙ?..</p>
        ) : grades.length === 0 ? (
          <p className="text-center py-8 text-sub text-sm">?к№…мӨү???к№ғнҲ’???лҶҒл’ҝ?лҚҲл–Һ.</p>
        ) : (
          <div className="divide-y divide-line">
            {grades.map((g, idx) => (
              <div key={g.id} className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 ${!g.active ? 'opacity-40' : ''}`}>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <span className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-800 w-12">{g.grade_value}</span>
                  <span className={`text-xs px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded ${g.active ? 'bg-green-50 text-green-700' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-500'}`}>
                    {g.active ? '?м’–кҪҰ' : 'йҚ®кҫӘмҶў??}
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  <button onClick={() => handleMove(g.id, 'up')} disabled={idx === 0}
                    className="text-xs px-2 py-1 text-sub hover:text-gray-700 disabled:opacity-30">??/button>
                  <button onClick={() => handleMove(g.id, 'down')} disabled={idx === grades.length - 1}
                    className="text-xs px-2 py-1 text-sub hover:text-gray-700 disabled:opacity-30">??/button>
                  <button onClick={() => handleToggle(g.id, g.active)}
                    className={`text-xs px-2 py-1 ${g.active ? 'text-yellow-600' : 'text-green-600'} hover:underline`}>
                    {g.active ? 'йҚ®кҫӘмҶў?? : '?м’–кҪҰ'}
                  </button>
                  <button onClick={() => handleDelete(g.id)}
                    className="text-xs px-2 py-1 text-red-500 hover:underline">??м Ј</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
